settings.question: What makes Radiant Root different from other hair care brands?
settings.answer: Our formulas are built around rosemary extract, clinically shown to match minoxidil for hair regrowth. Every ingredient is clean, sulfate-free, and paraben-free. We never use fillers or synthetic fragrances.

settings.question: Are your products safe for color-treated hair?
settings.answer: Yes. All Radiant Root products are formulated to be safe for color-treated, chemically processed, and natural hair. Our sulfate-free formulas will not strip color.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: Most customers notice a difference in texture and shine within 2 weeks. Significant hair growth results are typically visible at the 30-90 day mark with consistent use.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: We ship within 1-2 business days. Standard shipping takes 3-7 business days. Express 2-day shipping is available at checkout.

settings.question: Do you offer free shipping?
settings.answer: Yes! Orders over $50 qualify for free standard shipping within the US.

settings.question: Can I track my order?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Once your order ships you will receive an email with your tracking number. You can also visit our Track My Order page anytime.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If you are not completely happy with your purchase, contact us within 30 days for a full refund, no questions asked.

settings.question: How do I start a return?
settings.answer: Email us at hello@radiantroot.com with your order number and reason for return. We will send you a prepaid return label within 24 hours.
